hero.title: Clothes that smell like the sea and taste like sunset
hero.subtitle: Unique designs with a surfer soul. Every garment is made just for you, zero waste. Because the ocean deserves our care.

values.pod_text: No dead stock. Your garment is created when you order it, reducing textile waste.
values.materials_text: Organic cotton, recycled polyester and innovative fabrics that respect the planet.
values.design_text: Every print is born from ethnic motifs and our connection with the ocean. Art you wear.

featured.title: Most wanted
featured.subtitle: Pieces that connect with the sea and with the one who wears them

pod_banner.title: Made for you. Only for you.
pod_banner.text1: We don't have warehouses full of clothes waiting. When you place your order, your garment begins to exist. Each piece is a conscious act: no overproduction, no waste, no rush.
pod_banner.text2: It takes a little longer to arrive, but it's worth waiting for something made with you in mind.

newsletter.title: Join the tribe
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to know about new designs, exclusive drops and waves worth catching.

shop.subtitle: Every garment is made for you when you order it. No rush, no waste.

product.pod_badge: Made on demand -- takes 5-8 business days

about.title: We were born looking at the sea
about.subtitle: Nube Terracota is a surfer clothing brand born from the connection with the ocean, nature and the ethnic roots that inspire us.
about.history_p1: It all started with hand-drawn turtles, with ethnic strokes that blend the ancestral with the contemporary. Those drawings became the identity of a brand that wants to dress you with more than clothes: with intention.
about.history_p2: Nube Terracota exists for those who feel the sea is their place, that a sunset is reason enough to stop, and that what they wear should tell a story.
about.pod_title: Print on demand: fashion without waste
about.pod_intro: We don't have warehouses full of clothes. Every garment is made when you order it. This means:
about.pod_item1: Zero overproduction: we don't make what won't be used
about.pod_item2: Conscious materials: organic cotton, recycled fabrics
about.pod_item3: Eco-friendly inks: water-based, no harsh chemicals
about.pod_outro: It takes a bit longer than fast fashion. But fast fashion has a cost that doesn't show on the label.
about.turtles_p1: Sea turtles are our symbol. They've been navigating the oceans for millions of years with calm and determination. Our designs reinterpret them with ethnic motifs, creating pieces that are portable art.
about.turtles_p2: Every turtle is hand-drawn by the founder. They're not generic illustrations: they're characters with their own soul.
about.cta_subtitle: Clothes that connect with you and with the planet.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Questions, ideas, collaborations or just saying hello. We're on the other side.
contact.response_text: We reply within 24-48 business hours. If it's urgent, write URGENT in the subject.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success_text: We'll get back to you as soon as possible. Thanks for writing.
